# Copernicus DEM GLO-30

30m global Digital Elevation Model derived from the TanDEM-X mission.

## File

`copernicus_dem_n46_e008.tif` — Float32 COG, EPSG:4326, ~8 MB

Covers the N46 E008 tile (Swiss Alps, Bernese Oberland region).

## Source

- **Product**: Copernicus DEM GLO-30
- **Provider**: European Space Agency (ESA) / Airbus Defence and Space
- **Website**: https://spacedata.copernicus.eu/collections/copernicus-digital-elevation-model
- **Download**: https://copernicus-dem-30m.s3.amazonaws.com
